latest.title: bats use sonar to hunt above speed

latest.title: Desert ripples aren't just random sand
latest.script_key: those ripples not random noise the wind pushes grains in tiny jumps like a skipping stone fast grains leap slow ones stick that s why the crests stay sharp watch the next gust smooth them out did you think the desert never changed

latest.title: Mushrooms drink water without roots
